log: Rex Calloway strips the sidearm down and back up again without looking, humming something tuneless.
You wait a day in port. The dockworkers play cards. The meter runs.
◇ THE BROADCAST — every radio in the sector played the same four seconds. The band has holes in it now.
Rex Calloway has taken to leaving the radio on at night. "So I'd notice," they say, "if it went quiet."

Odile Vance names the ship on the far scope without looking twice. "Bad crowd," they add, in the tone of someone who used to be invited."

Kesh Barlow takes their coffee out to the viewport alone tonight, and stands there a long time, like someone doing arithmetic with a number they won't say.

⚠ STARVING — buy food, fast.

⚠ STARVING — buy food, fast.
Kesh Barlow is too weak to work and jumps ship at the first chance. Starvation is bad for retention.
Odile Vance has taken to leaving the radio on at night. "So I'd notice," they say, "if it went quiet."
